L=A(385763+-448116)k=A(1003907+-1066309)U=c[k]B=x[E[-554812-(-554816)]]W=C(761116+2218261,{})z=A(799224-861544)i=c[z]a=c[L]L={a(W)}Z={X(L)}a=544434+-544432 y=Z[a]z=i(y)i=A(39993-102416)D=B(z,i)B={D()}k=U(X(B))B=k D=x[E[-585856+585861]]k=D U=D and-772415+14451528 or 12015099-339401 end else Z=x[y]U=4335219-272761 k=Z end else if U<16665185-697420 then if U<528004+14694466 then a=-328509+328764 L=A(394149-456577)t=-196611-(-196612)y=789959+35184371298873 U={}x[E[898465+-898463]]=U k=x[E[368786+-368783]]z=k I=t t=303121-303121 k=D%y x[E[-721797+721801]]=k Z=D%a a=452794+-452792 U=-50957+2414411 y=Z+a x[E[954040-954035]]=y a=c[L]L=A(755638-818050)Z=a[L]a=Z(B)Z=A(563158+-625554)i[D]=Z Z=863293+-863094 K=I<t W=a L=711334-711333 t=L-I else U=k and-254960+15310117 or-24386-(-233348)end else U=true U=U and 6309988-769022 or 9442737-(-595123)end end else if U<-963621+17383517 then if U<469587+15770785 then if U<-593605+16790615 then i=10586028-54071 D=A(-795849-(-733485))k=5230177-(-713408)B=D^i U=k-B B=U k=A(823887-886231)U=k/B k={U}U=c[A(821180-883526)]else f=A(-586874+524502)K=c[f]U=-913603+2928488 R=x[M]I=U q=K+R R=-713336-(-713592)m=q%R K=m U=-373309+4974043 end end end end end end end U=#H return X(k)end return(y(-707061+6667577,{}))(X(k))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(147701-210061)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
